transcript.text:
[In today's mukbang...]
[I'm losing my mind and my soul...]
[We welcome you to this mesmerizing moment]
[Where are we today?]
Hello everyone
I've been craving some Nakji (webfoot octopus)
So I came to Mugyo-dong which is known for their Nakji in Seoul
I'm not sure how much I can eat because of my spice tolerance But let's give it a try
I want this over here
Something this big
[Arrived at the destination]
[Located on the ground floor of this high building]
[Maknae Nakji] [Seoul, Jongro-gu]
-Hello -Yes, hello
I heard that these are really spicy
I'm scared that it'll be too spicy

So let's just eat 3
Excuse me,
-How many can that plate serve? -2 people
-I'll take 3 of that -3 servings?
No, 3 plates
That's a lot of food
How spicy is it?
We can match your preference
Then should I get 4 plates?
Not spicy, mild, medium, and spicy
1 Korean style egg rolls,
1 clam soup, please
Do you think I can eat everything?
Try 3 plates first
No, 4 plates please!
Not spicy,

Next,
The color is different
You look much prettier in person
The camera can't capture your beauty
Thank you
[And the sides] Thank you
That's all for her?
[There's no way]
Everything's here
This is non-spicy
Mild, medium, and spicy
You can tell from the colors This is bloody red
Much lighter color of red here
Bon appetit
Non-spicy first
Wait, this is spicy

It's so meaty
I'm loving the meaty and tender consistency of the octopus
Clam soup
That's so refreshing
The soup...
I'm going to need some rice
Can I get 1 bowl of rice, please
Wrap it with some bean sprouts
Goes really well with bean sprouts
There's mixed rice here too, but I'll start with white rice
But these are pretty okay even for me to eat
But I feel like eating a lot of it will be spicy
My tongue feels a little numb already
-Drink these later -Thank you
[You're the best]
Thank you

She gave me milk too
She's the owner of the cafe next door
Thank you
I'll drink it later when it gets spicy
Let's try the next one
This is perfect
Tastes even better with more spice
They're not too different
But this has more flavor
Yum
It's better than this because it has more seasoning
I don't really eat clear soup like this
But this is so refreshing
Good thing I ordered this
Egg rolls My tongue is burning a little
With nakji on top

It's so good
You must get the eggs with these dishes So good
I love how there are no onions and other vegetables I'm okay with scallions
And they go well together
Next
Medium
There's more sauce in here
That's so different
Wait, 1 more time
It's different
Spicy
Good kind of spicy
It's still okay
It will hurt if it goes down the wrong hole
You must eat something like this during the Summer Sweat everything out
That's no joke

I feel like I need to get all the spice out of my mouth before I try this one
I'm already suffering from the spiciness, so there's no point
My tongue is vibrating
Wash it down with some milk
My face feels weird
Let's try the spicy
Delicious
Spicy but good
[It's raining]
WIth some white rice
That's really spicy
But really tasty because of the spice
Put some over rice
Just eating it from the spiciest level
[About to erupt]
Excuse me, more rice please

Thank you
[You shouldn't eat too much of that...]
[Yeah, that's why...]
You're so gorgeous
[Another fan]
Thank you
-Aren't you bad with spicy foods? -Yes
[Everyone knows now]
You know those spicy food challenges? This isn't that spicy
It's edible And it's tasty
Very spicy
[Tears]
It's spicier with white rice?
[That's why!]
I was going to make mixed rice with the non-spicy level
But mixing it will lower the spice level, so I'll use this one

It'll still be spicy
This is the real deal
Bean sprouts, sesame oil
This is going to be great
These are the vegetables that I don't mind Perfect
This tastes amazing with sesame oil
Mixed rice is really delicious
It's not as spicy
Still spicy though
She can eat well and she's pretty
She's skinny
[But very bad with spice]
I finished it all
[Thumbs up]
Can I please get the clam soup re-heated?
Thank you

-Nice to meet you -Hello
[The owner himself]
I watch you every night
Thank you
It's a little spicy, right?
I had the spicy level
Pair it with some pickled radish
[Execute right away]
1 bowl of rice as well, please
Thank you
I'll try to cool down a bit
That's not spicy at all
I should make mixed rice with this too
Although I'm bad with spice, I'd still order the Medium or the Spicy again
I thought she can't eat spicy foods
That's what my friends said

They're going nuts
Because you came to eat spicy food
[Tzuyang can't eat spicy food. Are you sure that's her?]
I'm zoning out
Excuse me, can I get some noodles on the side
Eggs
Tasty Sweet
-Are the nakji dishes usually this spicy here? -Yes
And you can control the spice elsewhere too?
They have even more spicy levels
So this place is considered not that spicy?
That's what the customers say
I can't eat anything spicier than this
Thank you
This is a lot
Some nakji on top

Spicier the better
Sesame oil over this would be good too
Some dried seaweed too
Bean sprouts
Excuse me
More rice, please
Thank you
More milk?
This will help out a lot
Thank you
I was dying
It already looks tasty
This is half rice half nakji
As far as flavors go, it goes 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th
The spiciest was the best
[She got used to the spiciness]

Last piece of egg
[Not paused]
[Takes time to recover]
Thanks everyone
You really finished everything
-It was really good -You did a good job
Good but spicy
Thank you I had a great meal
[Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
